spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The advocate casts one of the following spells, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}):

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The advocate makes two Fiendish Flame attacks.

action.name: Fiendish Flame
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. {@h}23 ({@damage 4d8 + 5}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Evasion (Level 10, Mobile Only)
entries: If the construct is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the construct instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Mettle (Level 10, Juggernaut Only)
entries: If the construct is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Constitution saving throw to take only half damage, the construct instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Tenacity (Level 10, Turret Only)
entries: The construct has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws it makes to avoid or end a condition on itself.

trait.name: Flight (Level 14, Mobile Only)
entries: The construct has a {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} of 50 feet.

trait.name: Fortified (Level 14, Juggernaut Only)
entries: The construct has {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.

trait.name: Laser Targeting (Level 14, Turret Only)
entries: The construct has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on ranged attack rolls.

action.name: Multiattack (Level 5)
entries: The construct makes additional attacks in any combination when you reach Druid levels 5 (2 attacks), 11 (3 attacks), and 17 (4 attacks).

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hitYourSpellAttack Bonus equals your spell attack modifier}, reach 5 ft. {@h}{@damage 1d8} + your Wisdom modifier Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Photon Cannon (Turret Only)
entries: {@atkr r} {@hitYourSpellAttack Bonus equals your spell attack modifier}, range 60/240 ft. {@h}{@damage 2d6} + your Wisdom modifier Radiant damage.

items.name: Multiattack
entries: The construct makes an additional attack in any combination.

items.name: Multiattack
entries: The construct makes 2 additional attacks in any combination.

items.name: Multiattack
entries: The construct makes 2 additional attacks in any combination.

items.name: Multiattack
entries: The construct makes 3 additional attacks in any combination.

items.name: Multiattack
entries: The construct makes an additional attack in any combination.

trait.name: Vacuum Aura
entries: The husk creates a magical vacuum in an 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from itself. A creature that ends its turn within the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} gains 1 {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level (even if it has a breathing apparatus, such as a {@item Life Suit|DarkMatter24}). When a creature leaves the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}, it removes all levels of {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} it gained from suffocating.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The husk makes two Suffocating Slam attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Gravitational Crush.

action.name: Suffocating Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Necrotic damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB|D20 Tests} until the end of the husk's next turn.

action.name: Gravitational Crush
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 14}, one creature within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Force damage and the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is 0 until the end of the husk's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Suffocating Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d6 + 2}) Necrotic damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB|D20 Tests} until the end of the husk's next turn.

hp.special: 5 plus five times your Gadgeteer level (M.A.C. has a number of Hit Dice [d8s] equal to your Gadgeteer level)

trait.name: Defensive Protocol
entries: While you are within 5 feet of M.A.C., attacks against you have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}.

trait.name: Heavy Duty
entries: M.A.C. counts as one size larger for the purpose of determining its carrying capacity.

action.name: Integrated Mace
entries: {@atkr m} Bonus equals your Intelligence modifier plus your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus}, reach 5 ft. {@h}{@damage 1d6 + 2} plus your Intelligence modifier Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Integrated Phaser
entries: {@atkr r} Bonus equals your Intelligence modifier plus your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus}, range 30/120 ft. {@h}{@damage 2d4} Lightning damage.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The drone doesn't provoke an {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB} when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

action.name: Integrated Blaster (Assault Only)
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 30/120 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 2d4}) Radiant damage.

action.name: Revival Protocol (Medical Only, 1/Day)
entries: The drone restores 9 ({@dice 2d8}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} to a creature within 5 feet of it.

action.name: Shield Projector (Shield Only)
entries: The drone projects a shield around a creature within 5 feet of it. The next time that the creature is hit by an attack roll before the start of the drone's next turn, roll a {@dice d6} and add it to the creature's AC, potentially causing the attack to miss.

items.name: Integrated Blaster
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 5}, range 30/120 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 2d6}) Radiant damage.

items.name: Revival Protocol (1/Day)
entries: The drone restores 18 ({@dice 4d8}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} to a creature within 5 feet of it.

items.name: Shield Projector
entries: The drone projects a shield around a creature within 5 feet of it. The next time that the creature is hit by an attack roll before the start of the drone's next turn, roll a {@dice d8} and add it to the creature's AC, potentially causing the attack to miss.

action.name: Fiendish Flame
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The kobold has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the kobold's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and overlords that deter spacesharks the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Composite Spear
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Harpoon Gun {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 12}, one creature the kobold can see within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Piercing damage and the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is 0 until the start of the kobold's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.
